structured_payload_candidate.title: CWRT Control - CWRT Setpoint Calculation
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Calculate CWRT setpoint as CHWSTsp + LIFTtarget, where LIFTtarget = Max(LIFTmin, Min(LIFTmax, A*PLRplant + B)).
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any chillers enabled and WSE disabled.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set CWRTsp = CHWSTsp + LIFTtarget, with LIFTtarget = Max(LIFTmin, Min(LIFTmax, A*PLRplant + B)), where A = 1.1*(LIFTmax - LIFTmin), B = LIFTmax - A.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: CWRT setpoint, CWRTsp, shall be the output of the following equation. CWRTsp = CHWSTsp + LIFTtarget LIFTtarget = Max(LIFTmin, Min(LIFTmax, A*PLRPlant + B)) A = 1.1*(LIFTmax - LIFTmin) B = LIFTmax - A

structured_payload_candidate.title: CWRT Control - Tower Speed Command (Close Coupled)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Tower speed command is the lowest of CWRTTowerSpd, HpTowerMaxSpd from each chiller, and PlrTowerMaxSpd.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any condenser water pump proven on.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Maintain CWRT at setpoint by direct acting PID loop. Map loop output to CWRTTowerSpd from minimum speed at 0% to 100% at 100%. Tower speed command = lowest of CWRTTowerSpd, HpTowerMaxSpd from each chiller, and PlrTowerMaxSpd.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When any condenser water pump is proven on, CWRT shall be maintained at setpoint by a direct acting PID loop. The loop output shall be mapped to the variable CWRTTowerSpd. Map CWRTTowerSpd from minimum tower speed at 0% loop output to 100% speed at 100% loop output. Tower speed command signal shall be the lowest value of CWRTTowerSpd, HpTowerMaxSpd from each chiller head pressure control loop, and PlrTowerMaxSpd.

structured_payload_candidate.title: CWRT Control - Tower Speed Command (Not Close Coupled)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Cooling Towers (CWRT Control, Not Close Coupled)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Control CWST to setpoint derived from CWRTsp minus CWdt; tower speed command is lowest of CWSTTowerSpd, HpTowerMaxSpd, and PlrTowerMaxSpd.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any condenser water pump proven on.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set CWSTsp = CWRTsp - CWdt (5-min rolling average of CWRT - CWST). Maintain CWST at setpoint by direct acting PID loop. Map loop output to CWSTTowerSpd. Tower speed command = lowest of CWSTTowerSpd, HpTowerMaxSpd, and PlrTowerMaxSpd.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When any condenser water pump is proven on, CWRT shall be controlled to CWRTsp by setting CWST setpoint, CWSTsp, equal to CWRTsp minus CWdt, where CWdt is the 5 minute rolling average of common condenser water return temperature less condenser water supply temperature... When any condenser water pump is proven on, CWST shall be maintained at setpoint by a direct acting PID loop. The loop output shall be mapped to the variable CWSTTowerSpd. Reset CWSTTowerSpd from minimum tower speed at 0% loop output to 100% speed at 100% loop output. Tower speed command signal shall be the lowest value of CWSTTowerSpd, HpTowerMaxSpd from each chiller head pressure control loop, and PlrTowerMaxSpd.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Tower Fan Disable Logic (CWRT Control)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Disable tower fans if any enabled chiller's HpTowerMaxSpd at minimum for 5 minutes, or fans at minimum for 5 minutes and CWRT/CWST below setpoint minus 1°F.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any enabled chiller's HpTowerMaxSpd has equaled tower minimum speed for 5 minutes; or tower fans at minimum speed for 5 minutes and CWRT drops below setpoint minus 1°F (or CWST drops below setpoint minus 1°F).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Disable the tower fans if either i. Any enabled chiller’s HpTowerMaxSpd has equaled tower minimum speed for 5 minutes, or ii. Tower fans have been at minimum speed for 5 minutes and CWRT drops below setpoint minus 1°F.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Tower Fan Enable Logic (CWRT Control)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Enable tower fans if off for at least 1 minute, CWRT/CWST rises above setpoint by 1°F, and all enabled chillers' HpTowerMaxSpd > minimum speed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fans off for at least 1 minute, CWRT rises above setpoint by 1°F (or CWST rises above setpoint by 1°F), and all enabled chillers' HpTowerMaxSpd > tower minimum speed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Enable the tower fans if i. They have been off for at least 1 minute, and ii. CWRT rises above setpoint by 1°F, and iii. All enabled chillers’ HpTowerMaxSpd are greater than tower minimum speed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: CWST Control - Stepwise Reset Logic
structured_payload_candidate.summary: At end of each time interval, reset CWSTsp down 1°F if conditions allow, else up 1°F, else no change.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: End of time interval (Chilled Water Plant Reset time step + 5 minutes).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: After initial interval, reset CWSTsp down 1°F. For subsequent intervals, reset down 1°F if CWST ≤ setpoint+0.5°F, fan speed < 95%, CHWST setpoint not increased, and efficiency improved; else reset up 1°F if CWST ≥ setpoint-0.5°F; else no change.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: i. After the initial time interval, reset CWSTsp down 1°F. ii. For each subsequent time interval, reset CWSTsp down by 1°F if CWST is no more than 0.5°F above present setpoint, tower fan speed command is less than 95%, CHWST setpoint has not increased relative to the setpoint at the end of the previous interval, and either: (a) CWSTsp had reset down in the previous time interval and EffCh+T is now less than at the previous setpoint change. (b) CWSTsp had reset up in the previous time interval and EffCh+T is now greater than at the previous setpoint change. iii. Else, if CWST is no more than 0.5°F below present setpoint, reset CWSTsp up by 1°F. iv. Else, do not change CWSTsp.

structured_payload_candidate.title: WSE Mode - Integrated Operation Fan Speed
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When WSE enabled and chiller(s) running, fan speed = WseTower-MaxSpeed, reset by PID loop maintaining chiller load at 110% of sum of MinUnloadCapX.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Fan speed = WseTower-MaxSpeed. Reset WseTower-MaxSpeed by direct acting PID loop maintaining chiller load at 110% of sum of MinUnloadCapX for operating chillers. Map from minimum speed at 0% output to 100% at 100% output. Bias loop to launch from 100% output. Hold at 100% for 10 minutes after starting integrated operation.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: i. Fan speed shall be equal to WseTower-MaxSpeed. ii. WseTower-MaxSpeed shall be reset by a direct acting PID loop maintaining the chiller load at 110% of the sum of MinUnloadCapX values for the operating chillers. Map WseTower-MaxSpeed from minimum speed at 0% loop output to 100% speed at 100% loop output. Bias the loop to launch from 100% output. iii. When starting integrated operation after previously operating with only the WSE, hold WseTower-MaxSpeed at 100% for 10 minutes to give the chiller time to get up to speed and produce at least MinUnloadCapX, then enable the loop.

structured_payload_candidate.title: WSE Mode - WSE Only Fan Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When WSE running alone, modulate fan speed to maintain CHWST at setpoint; cycle fans off if CHWST drops below setpoint and fans at minimum for 5 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate fan speed by direct acting PID loop to maintain CHWST at setpoint, mapping from minimum at 0% output to maximum at 100% output. If CHWST drops below setpoint and fans at minimum for 5 minutes, cycle fans off for at least 3 minutes and until CHWST rises above setpoint by 1°F.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: i. Fan speed shall be modulated to maintain CHWST at setpoint by a direct acting PID loop that resets fan speed from minimum at 0% loop output to maximum at 100% loop output. ii. If CHWST drops below setpoint and fans have been at minimum fan speed for 5 minutes, fans shall cycle off for at least 3 minutes and until CHWST rises above setpoint by 1°F.
